source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The following cumulative graph gives the electricity demand of a certain town.The power plant that provides electricity to this town is capable of generating 12,000 kW daily. On what percent of days will the power plant not be able to meet the demand for electricity?
extraction_notes: answer value 0 interpreted as the first choice in the choices array
image field contains a PIL image object representation, not a path or URL

multiple-choice format with approximate options suggests graph interpretation plus a comparison/complement step rather than a single direct text lookup
